ConstructorArguments: A box which can be used to explicitly control scene visibility. There are two modes: 1. Cull inside, hide any objects fully inside the box (excluder) 2. Cull outside, hide any objects not intersecting any cull boxes marked cull outside (includer)

Documentation.Summary:
A box which can be used to explicitly control scene visibility. 
There are two modes:
1. Cull inside, hide any objects fully inside the box (excluder)
2. Cull outside, hide any objects not intersecting any cull boxes marked cull outside (includer)
